author: CMS-HGCAL
body: #### PR description: This PR updates the unpacking of HD full module ECON-D data by adding the offset of +/- 37 indices. The following changes were made. - `muxMode` field is introduced in`HGCalROCConfig` in `HGCalConfiguration.h` - It was populated from the JSON `MultiPlex` configuration file in `HGCalConfigurationESProducer` - In `HGCalUnpacker`, the dense channel index is shifted by `(muxMode - erxIdx) * 37`, so channel data are unpacked into the correct routing position. **Link to the issue created on HGCAL-DPG** https://gitlab.cern.ch/hgcal-dpg/hgcal-comm/-/issues/84 #### PR validation: Plot shows the run taken with fixed ADC for one of the high density module and appears reasonable. assign hgcal-dpg
title: HD full module readout corrected
